title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice · Evaluation Brief: Claude Clarity Context
summary: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt claude clarity context increment in a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.
Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Claude Clarity Context evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-claude-clarity-context-18sxt2" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Claude Clarity Context into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-claude-clarity-context-18sxt2
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
